name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Commands Linux
notes:
This Building Block detects relevant commands often related to malware or hacking activity.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Commands Linux
SIGMA Description: Detects relevant commands often related to malware or hacking activity


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Commands Linux on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Attempt

when the event matches (LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%execve%' and (LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%chmod%777%') or (LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%chmod%' and LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%u+s%') or (LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%cp%' and LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%/bin/ksh%') or (LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%cp%' and LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%/bin/sh%')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Commands Linux on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Command Execution Attempt

AND when the event matches (LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%execve%' and (LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%chmod%777%') or (LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%chmod%' and LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%u+s%') or (LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%cp%' and LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%/bin/ksh%') or (LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%cp%' and LOWER("Command Arguments") LIKE '%/bin/sh%')) AQL filter query
